Fine craquelure webbing across both cheekbones like porcelain left too long in winter light, beautiful and fractured simultaneously.
Dark vein network visible at temples and throat, pulsing faintly with something too thick and slow to be blood.
Skin stretched paper-thin over orbital bones, revealing the delicate architecture of skull beneath translucent blue-white flesh.
Single elegant crack running from outer eye corner to jawline, edges sharp and clean as broken china.
Blue-grey undertone suffusing all flesh like a body pulled from deep cold water three days past.
Cheekbones jutting angular and severe, temples sunken into shadow-pools that catch no light at all.
Spider-web of indigo veins radiating from inner eye corners across bridge of nose, mapping corruption beneath.
Wax-like sheen to all skin that reflects light incorrectly, too smooth and too still to be living tissue.
Hairline fracture-lines tracing delicate patterns across forehead and down one cheek like Renaissance fresco left in frost.
Violet-grey discoloration pooling at eye hollows and throat-hollow, spreading outward in watercolor stains through pale skin.
Matte chalk-white texture across face with subtle grey mottling at bridge of nose, elegant as weathered marble.
Jaw-hinge showing hairline splits where skin meets bone, revealing only darkness in the spaces between structure.
Translucent skin at throat revealing dark arterial branches beneath, each vessel mapping the absent pulse in perfect stillness.
Deep crack bisecting the lower lip and continuing down through chin, edges precise as if carved deliberately into porcelain.
Entire face bears faint craquelure pattern like oil paint centuries old, most concentrated around mouth and eye corners.
Sunken temples creating dramatic shadow-wells on either side, the concave flesh catching darkness like empty bowls.
Frost-rime crystallizing along the hairline and outer eyebrow edges, never melting despite ambient warmth around it.
Blue-black vein clusters flowering beneath translucent skin at collarbones, spreading upward toward jaw in organic fractals.
Grey-white pallor interrupted by livid bruise-purple patches at cheekbone peaks where blood settled and stopped moving.
Skin texture seamless and mask-smooth across entire face, no pores visible, surface reading as carved wax or cold marble.
Gaunt jaw revealing tendon cords at neck like architectural support cables, too visible beneath tissue stretched impossibly thin.
Vertical crack descending from center of forehead between brows to bridge of nose, splitting the face into symmetrical halves.
Violet discoloration bleeding outward from lips into surrounding skin, staining the flesh in concentric rings of fading color.
Orbital bones pressing sharp against under-eye skin, creating pronounced ridges that cast shadows across upper cheek planes.
Skin split along the cheekbone's upper edge in three parallel hairline cracks, revealing only shadow-depth beneath the fracture lines.
